title: EMERGENCY YOUTH SHELTER - 211info
text: MY FRIEND'S PLACE EMERGENCY YOUTH SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a voluntary short-term shelter that offers a stable home, single rooms, meals, and supportive adults. Must consent to stay and agree to shelter rules, including no weapons or drugs. 505 N 9th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Ages 10-17 experiencing homelessness or at risk of homelessness Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 884-2319 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 884-2319 Main phone Main phone (541) 884-2319 Hotline (541) 884-2319 Runaway Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Jefferson and Lincoln Streets. BTS bus stop is 2 blocks away. Services: Youth Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MY FRIEND'S PLACE
